item.title: AI support in Aamu.app
item.description: A reading path for Aamu.app's AI support workflow: AI workspace, Team Brain, support knowledge bases, customer support drafts, Helpdesk triage, and Linear comparison.

item.title: How to build a support knowledge base that AI can actually use
item.description: How to write support policies, product answers, escalation rules, and examples so AI can retrieve useful context instead of guessing.

item.title: Outbound webhooks in Aamu.app: real-time events for tasks, Helpdesk, email, and more
item.description: How Aamu.app outbound webhooks send signed real-time events for tasks, Helpdesk, email, forms, meetings, files, docs, databases, projects, and teams.

item.title: Aamu.app vs Linear Triage: customer conversations, Team Brain, and human-reviewed AI support
item.description: A practical comparison of Linear Triage and Aamu.app Helpdesk AI triage: product issue intake versus customer conversation intake.

item.title: From Helpdesk ticket to Team Brain: AI triage, Docs, and human review in Aamu.app
item.description: How Aamu.app connects Helpdesk AI triage, Docs, Team Brain, tasks, and human review so support teams can answer from maintained knowledge.

item.title: How Aamu.app uses Team Brain to answer from your company knowledge
item.description: How Team Brain helps Aamu.app answer from maintained company knowledge instead of generic AI guesses.

item.title: Aamu.app as an AI workspace alternative to Notion AI, Slack AI, Jira, and Zendesk
item.description: How Aamu.app works as an AI workspace alternative for teams that want docs, chat, tasks, support, and shared knowledge in one connected system.

item.title: AI customer support with Aamu.app: Team Brain, drafts, and human review
item.description: How Aamu.app uses Team Brain, AI-generated drafts, and human review to make customer support faster without losing control.

item.title: Building with the Aamu API: From Tasks to Docs and GraphQL
item.description: A practical guide to the Aamu API for tasks, docs, meetings, files, forms, email workflows, and GraphQL database rows.

item.title: Aamu.app Emails - feature overview
item.description: An overview of Aamu.app Emails: shared project inboxes, contacts, drafts, attachments, tasks, and API-assisted email workflows.

item.title: Internal Links in Aamu.app
item.description: How internal links in Aamu.app connect docs, tasks, projects, meetings, support tickets, files, and other workspace context.

item.title: Keyboard shortcuts in Aamu.app
item.description: A guide to Aamu.app keyboard shortcuts for faster navigation, search, task handling, comments, emails, and daily workspace flow.

item.title: All the productivity apps you could think of (100+)
item.description: A broad map of productivity app categories and how teams can think about choosing tools for planning, communication, knowledge, and work.

item.title: Penpot Design Tool - feature overview
item.description: An overview of Penpot in Aamu.app for open-source design work, files, collaboration, and project-connected design workflows.

item.title: Aamu.app Docs - feature overview
item.description: An overview of Aamu.app Docs for writing, sharing, linking, searching, and turning team knowledge into useful workspace context.

item.title: Aamu.app Helpdesk - feature overview
item.description: An overview of Aamu.app Helpdesk for email support, live chat, ticket handling, internal notes, Team Brain, and AI reply drafts.

item.title: Video Meetings - feature overview
item.description: An overview of Aamu.app video meetings, including project meetings, invitees, reminders, comments, Event Booking, and the Meetings API.

item.title: Aamu.app Tasks - feature overview
item.description: An overview of Aamu.app Tasks for project work, assignments, dates, reminders, comments, files, linked context, and AI-assisted follow-up.

item.title: Database automations with Aamu.app
item.description: How Aamu.app database automations can turn structured rows, forms, and workflow events into useful actions inside a team workspace.

item.title: Creating survey forms with Aamu.app Form Builder
item.description: How to create survey forms with Aamu.app Form Builder and store responses in a connected database for follow-up and reporting.

item.title: Setting up Helpdesk in Aamu.app - Part 2, livechat
item.description: How to set up Aamu.app Helpdesk live chat for website conversations, support routing, email fallback, and connected ticket handling.

item.title: Setting up Helpdesk in Aamu.app - Part 1, emails
item.description: How to set up Aamu.app Helpdesk email support so incoming customer messages become manageable support tickets in your workspace.

item.title: Setting up Emails in Aamu.app
item.description: How to set up Aamu.app Emails for a project mailbox, shared inbox work, contacts, sending, replies, and connected follow-up tasks.

item.title: Aamu.app as a Calendly alternative
item.description: How Aamu.app Event Booking works as a Calendly alternative with booking pages, availability, project meetings, and connected follow-up.

item.title: Creating a single-page application with Aamu.app's database and GraphQL API
item.description: How to build a single-page application on top of Aamu.app databases using the generated GraphQL API for structured row data.

item.title: Creating a contact form with Aamu.app
item.description: Using the Aamu.app database for contact forms

item.title: Creating a blog with Aamu.app
item.description: How this Hugo blog uses Aamu.app as a headless CMS with database rows, Docs content, GraphQL, generated Markdown, and static publishing.

item.title: Introduction to Aamu.app
item.description: Aamu.app is an all-in-one productivity tool
